'''Sarl Random''' was a security officer on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. She was promoted to acting Security Chief of the city by [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] after bringing him evidence that his former security chief, [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]], was responsible for destroying a quarter of Cloud City's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] population.

==Appearances==
